scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.test: npm run test:run --workspace=backend && npm run test:run --workspace=frontend
